역대상 6:1.content: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

역대상 6:2.content: The sons of Kohath: Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.

역대상 6:3.content: The children of Amram: Aaron, Moses, and Miriam. The sons of Aaron: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

역대상 6:4.content: Eleazar became the father of Phinehas, Phinehas became the father of Abishua,

역대상 6:5.content: Abishua became the father of Bukki. Bukki became the father of Uzzi.

역대상 6:6.content: Uzzi became the father of Zerahiah. Zerahiah became the father of Meraioth.

역대상 6:7.content: Meraioth became the father of Amariah. Amariah became the father of Ahitub.

역대상 6:8.content: Ahitub became the father of Zadok. Zadok became the father of Ahimaaz.

역대상 6:9.content: Ahimaaz became the father of Azariah. Azariah became the father of Johanan.

역대상 6:10.content: Johanan became the father of Azariah, who executed the priest’s office in the house that Solomon built in Jerusalem.

역대상 6:11.content: Azariah became the father of Amariah. Amariah became the father of Ahitub.

역대상 6:12.content: Ahitub became the father of Zadok. Zadok became the father of Shallum.

역대상 6:13.content: Shallum became the father of Hilkiah. Hilkiah became the father of Azariah.

역대상 6:14.content: Azariah became the father of Seraiah. Seraiah became the father of Jehozadak.

역대상 6:15.content: Jehozadak went into captivity, when Yahweh carried Judah and Jerusalem away by the hand of Nebuchadnezzar.

역대상 6:16.content: The sons of Levi: Gershom, Kohath, and Merari.

역대상 6:17.content: These are the names of the sons of Gershom: Libni and Shimei.

역대상 6:18.content: The sons of Kohath were Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.

역대상 6:19.content: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their fathers’ households.

역대상 6:20.content: Of Gershom: Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,

역대상 6:21.content: Joah his son, Iddo his son, Zerah his son, and Jeatherai his son.

역대상 6:22.content: The sons of Kohath: Amminadab his son, Korah his son, Assir his son,

역대상 6:23.content: Elkanah his son, and Ebiasaph his son, Assir his son,

역대상 6:24.content: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.

역대상 6:25.content: The sons of Elkanah: Amasai and Ahimoth.

역대상 6:26.content: As for Elkanah, the sons of Elkanah: Zophai his son, Nahath his son,

역대상 6:27.content: Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, and Elkanah his son.

역대상 6:28.content: The sons of Samuel: the firstborn, Joel, and the second, Abijah.

역대상 6:29.content: The sons of Merari: Mahli, Libni his son, Shimei his son, Uzzah his son,

역대상 6:30.content: Shimea his son, Haggiah his son, Asaiah his son.

역대상 6:31.content: These are they whom David set over the service of song in Yahweh’s house, after the ark came to rest there.

역대상 6:32.content: They ministered with song before the tabernacle of the Tent of Meeting, until Solomon had built Yahweh’s house in Jerusalem. They performed the duties of their office according to their order.

역대상 6:33.content: These are those who served, and their sons. Of the sons of the Kohathites: Heman the singer, the son of Joel, the son of Samuel,

역대상 6:34.content: the son of Elkanah, the son of Jeroham, the son of Eliel, the son of Toah,

역대상 6:35.content: the son of Zuph, the son of Elkanah, the son of Mahath, the son of Amasai,

역대상 6:36.content: the son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,

역대상 6:37.content: the son of Tahath, the son of Assir, the son of Ebiasaph, the son of Korah,

역대상 6:38.content: the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, the son of Israel.

역대상 6:39.content: His brother Asaph, who stood on his right hand, even Asaph the son of Berechiah, the son of Shimea,

역대상 6:40.content: the son of Michael, the son of Baaseiah, the son of Malchijah,

역대상 6:41.content: the son of Ethni, the son of Zerah, the son of Adaiah,

역대상 6:42.content: the son of Ethan, the son of Zimmah, the son of Shimei,

역대상 6:43.content: the son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.

역대상 6:44.content: On the left hand their brothers the sons of Merari: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,

역대상 6:45.content: the son of Hashabiah, the son of Amaziah, the son of Hilkiah,

역대상 6:46.content: the son of Amzi, the son of Bani, the son of Shemer,

역대상 6:47.content: the son of Mahli, the son of Mushi, the son of Merari, the son of Levi.

역대상 6:48.content: Their brothers the Levites were appointed for all the service of the tabernacle of God’s house.

역대상 6:49.content: But Aaron and his sons offered on the altar of burnt offering, and on the altar of incense, for all the work of the most holy place, and to make atonement for Israel, according to all that Moses the servant of God had commanded.

역대상 6:50.content: These are the sons of Aaron: Eleazar his son, Phinehas his son, Abishua his son,

역대상 6:51.content: Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,

역대상 6:52.content: Meraioth his son, Amariah his son, Ahitub his son,

역대상 6:53.content: Zadok his son, and Ahimaaz his son.

역대상 6:54.content: Now these are their dwelling places according to their encampments in their borders: to the sons of Aaron, of the families of the Kohathites (for theirs was the first lot),

역대상 6:55.content: to them they gave Hebron in the land of Judah, and its pasture lands around it;

역대상 6:56.content: but the fields of the city, and its villages, they gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh.

역대상 6:57.content: To the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of refuge, Hebron; Libnah also with its pasture lands, Jattir, Eshtemoa with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:58.content: Hilen with its pasture lands, Debir with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:59.content: Ashan with its pasture lands, and Beth Shemesh with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:60.content: and out of the tribe of Benjamin, Geba with its pasture lands, Allemeth with its pasture lands, and Anathoth with its pasture lands. All their cities throughout their families were thirteen cities.

역대상 6:61.content: To the rest of the sons of Kohath were given by lot, out of the family of the tribe, out of the half-tribe, the half of Manasseh, ten cities.

역대상 6:62.content: To the sons of Gershom, according to their families, out of the tribe of Issachar, and out of the tribe of Asher, and out of the tribe of Naphtali, and out of the tribe of Manasseh in Bashan, thirteen cities.

역대상 6:63.content: To the sons of Merari were given by lot, according to their families, out of the tribe of Reuben, and out of the tribe of Gad, and out of the tribe of Zebulun, twelve cities.

역대상 6:64.content: The children of Israel gave to the Levites the cities with their pasture lands.

역대상 6:65.content: They gave by lot out of the tribe of the children of Judah, and out of the tribe of the children of Simeon, and out of the tribe of the children of Benjamin, these cities which are mentioned by name.

역대상 6:66.content: Some of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their borders out of the tribe of Ephraim.

역대상 6:67.content: They gave to them the cities of refuge, Shechem in the hill country of Ephraim with its pasture lands, and Gezer with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:68.content: Jokmeam with its pasture lands, Beth Horon with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:69.content: Aijalon with its pasture lands, Gath Rimmon with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:70.content: and out of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Aner with its pasture lands, and Bileam with its pasture lands, for the rest of the family of the sons of Kohath.

역대상 6:71.content: To the sons of Gershom were given, out of the family of the half-tribe of Manasseh, Golan in Bashan with its pasture lands, and Ashtaroth with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:72.content: and out of the tribe of Issachar, Kedesh with its pasture lands, Daberath with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:73.content: Ramoth with its pasture lands, and Anem with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:74.content: and out of the tribe of Asher, Mashal with its pasture lands, Abdon with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:75.content: Hukok with its pasture lands, and Rehob with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:76.content: and out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee with its pasture lands, Hammon with its pasture lands, and Kiriathaim with its pasture lands.

역대상 6:77.content: To the rest of the Levites, the sons of Merari, were given, out of the tribe of Zebulun, Rimmono with its pasture lands, Tabor with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:78.content: and beyond the Jordan at Jericho, on the east side of the Jordan, were given them, out of the tribe of Reuben, Bezer in the wilderness with its pasture lands, and Jahzah with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:79.content: Kedemoth with its pasture lands, and Mephaath with its pasture lands;

역대상 6:80.content: and out of the tribe of Gad, Ramoth in Gilead with its pasture lands, Mahanaim with its pasture lands,

역대상 6:81.content: Heshbon with its pasture lands, and Jazer with its pasture lands.
